certificate.caveat: No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys).
certificate.description: The KeyPair FIPS Provider for OpenSSL 3 is available to technology vendors that require FIPS 140-3 validated cryptography for OpenSSL 3. Please contact KeyPair Consulting to include your desired operating system as a Tested Configuration on a FIPS 140-3 certificate branded in your company's name.
